item.title: I'm gonna punch the younger sibling in the nuts
(no title)
item.content:encoded: Oh this…I could totally see my brother doing this to me if I ever went blind.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
A bitter younger sibling takes one last chance to spite his older brother for childhood difficulties with a cruel joke. 2020 vision, not 20/20.

Ah, that's fantastic. I'm unsure about the rules of whatever challenge this was for, but if edits are possible then I'd suggest adding something at the end to solidify the tone of the ending. Like, Sam refusing to comment on the nature of his relationship with his brother, just to drive home that some nasty stuff exists between them that couldn't be, and never was, resolved by a pair of magic glasses.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
You are correct in that's what is going on. A bitter younger sibling takes one last chance to spite his older brother for childhood difficulties with a cruel joke. 2020 vision, not 20/20.

Appreciate the rest of your feedback too; I know the personal letter is a bit too convenient but I felt like the message was going to be able to override my execution. I hope to learn from this! Thanks for your time.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
This is generally pretty cool but I'm shaky on the ending. The note exposits a bit too much, and the reveal that the glasses only worked for a year seems needlessly cruel. It fits with the line about "2020 vision", but in the narrative it reads that James miraculously restores his brother's vision in a show of reconciliation, and then revokes that miracle soon afterward — potentially as revenge for past grievances? As in, lying to him and giving him false hope?

That's pretty messed up, and if it was your intention then it's fantastic, if a bit poorly executed. Regardless, very impressive that this was done in one sitting.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
This is a great entry. Poignant and sad and all the good things.

Solid +1, excellent response to the Challenge

item.title: Author post
item.content:encoded:
Hello and welcome to my scip, executed under Bright's Challenge to write in one sitting.

The cruelty of kindness between two distant brothers. The spirit of Christmas is alive and well within AWCY?.

The image is "DSC_0004" by hsuanwei and is licensed under CC-BY-SA 2.0
